response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong technical depth across 16+ years with relevant developer tools and infrastructure experience, they lack the critical people management background required for this role. The job explicitly requires 2 years in people management or team leadership, and this resume shows zero direct management experience. The candidate appears to be a distinguished individual contributor and technical expert, not a ready people leader.
strengths: 16+ years of software development across diverse tech stacks and domains
Hands-on experience with developer tools, CI/CD, and infrastructure (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory setup at Altom)
Strong emphasis on code quality and testing culture through frameworks, workshops, and open source contributions
concerns: Zero demonstrated people management experience despite role requiring 2 years minimum
Developer tools experience is ~2 years (Altom 2016-2018) and partially dated, falling short of 3-year requirement
Currently in individual contributor track (Staff Engineer, Senior Developer) with no evidence of managing teams or organizational initiatives

key_factors.factor: Technical depth and code quality focus
